queries.feature_definition: Checking account status: balance below 0 DM.
queries.question: Empirical analysis of negative checking account balances as a credit risk driver contributing to higher default probability.

queries.feature_definition: Checking account status: no checking account.
queries.question: Determinants of default associated with the absence of a checking account and its role in increasing credit risk exposure.

queries.feature_definition: Credit history: critical account or other existing credits.
queries.question: Empirical analysis of critical credit history or existing credit obligations as a mitigating factor in credit risk assessment.
